summary: Comprehensive testing of JT-Zero robotics runtime Phase 5 (Camera Pipeline) and Phase 6 (MAVLink Interface) completed successfully. All new endpoints functional, real-time WebSocket streaming working, new dashboard panels integrated.

flaky_endpoints.issue: State transition timing issue - TAKEOFF command executes but state validation may fail due to timing
flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Command succeeds but state change not immediately visible
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Add longer wait time for state transitions

passed_tests: GET /api/camera returns complete camera stats (camera_type, fps_actual, frame_count, width, height, vo_features_detected, vo_features_tracked, vo_tracking_quality, vo_dx, vo_dy, vo_valid)

GET /api/mavlink returns complete mavlink stats (state=CONNECTED, messages_sent>0, messages_received>0, link_quality, fc_autopilot='ArduPilot', fc_firmware='ArduPilot 4.5.0', vision_pos_sent, odometry_sent, optical_flow_sent)
WebSocket /api/ws/telemetry includes camera and mavlink data in real-time payload
Dashboard Camera/Visual Odometry panel displays feature map SVG, FPS (14.7), frames (4499), resolution (320x240), VO features (72/103), quality (70%), VO delta values

Dashboard MAVLink panel shows CONNECTED status, system/component IDs (1/191), link quality (94%), FC info (ArduPilot AP 4.5.0 QUADROTOR), message counters (TX: 12267, RX: 8178), vision message types (VISION_POS: 2148, ODOMETRY: 2143, OPT_FLOW: 2141)
Sidebar threads show all 8 threads running including T5_MAVLink and T6_Camera threads
Event log displays CAMERA_VO_UPDATE and MAVLINK_HEARTBEAT events in real-time
Dashboard header shows flight mode, battery, connection status correctly
Command buttons work - ARM changes mode to ARMED, DISARM returns to IDLE
Real-time WebSocket updates at 10Hz - camera frame count and mavlink message counters increment continuously
Feature map visualization shows FAST corner detection points and Lucas-Kanade flow vectors
Visual Odometry quality percentage and motion estimates (dx, dy, vx, vy) update in real-time
MAVLink message type counters increment at different rates (VISION_POS, ODOMETRY ~30Hz, OPT_FLOW ~15Hz)

success_percentage.backend: 95% - All new endpoints working, minor timing issue with TAKEOFF state validation
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - Camera and MAVLink panels perfectly integrated, real-time updates working
success_percentage.integration: 100% - WebSocket includes camera/mavlink data, command flow works correctly
success_percentage.websocket: 100% - Real-time streaming at 10Hz with new camera/mavlink payload working perfectly
success_percentage.camera_pipeline: 100% - FAST corner detection + Lucas-Kanade optical flow + Visual Odometry fully functional
success_percentage.mavlink_interface: 100% - VISION_POSITION_ESTIMATE, ODOMETRY, OPTICAL_FLOW_RAD messages working correctly
